prompt:
[Use the uploaded reference image as PRIMARY face identity source]

Ultra-realistic vintage flash portrait of the SAME person from the reference image.

IDENTITY LOCK (VERY IMPORTANT):
Preserve exact face identity from the reference image.
Same facial structure, jawline, eyes, nose, lips.
Do NOT change face.
Do NOT beautify or stylize face.
Keep beard natural and similar (no extra growth, no removal).
Skin should remain clean and natural (no pimples, no added texture).

POSE & FRAMING:
Side profile pose.
Head slightly turned downward.
One hand raised in front of face, fully covering face naturally (as in reference style).
Upper body framing for profile picture.

CLOTHING (LOCKED):
White kurta pajama.
Soft cotton texture with natural folds.
Loose sleeves, slightly wrinkled fabric.
Even if reference image has different clothes, KEEP THIS kurta.

HAIR:
Well-groomed, slightly voluminous modern hairstyle.
Clean sides, natural flow.

LIGHTING (KEY FEATURE):
Strong direct camera flash.
Harsh frontal lighting.
Bright highlights on shirt and hand.
Hard shadow cast on wall behind subject.
Slight overexposure on white fabric.

STYLE / EFFECT:
Vintage digital camera look.
Visible film grain.
Slight noise and texture.
Muted warm tones.
Subtle vignette.
Old camera flash aesthetic (early 2000s vibe).

BACKGROUND:
Plain wall.
Minimal, no distractions.
Soft shadow visible.

CAMERA:
Close-up portrait (DP style).
50mm lens feel.
Sharp focus on subject.

REALISM:
Photorealistic.
No AI artifacts.
No distortion.
Clean but natural skin.

--v 6 --style raw --ar 1:1 --q 2 --s 75 --iw 2

[Use the uploaded face image as the PRIMARY identity reference]

High-end cinematic fashion poster of the SAME person walking in an urban architectural environment.

IDENTITY (HIGH PRIORITY):
Preserve facial identity from reference image.
Same face structure, beard, eyes, nose, lips.
Keep natural look (no distortion, no over-stylizing).
Face can be partially visible (side angle / downward look).

POSE & MOTION:
Full body walking pose.
Head slightly down, relaxed confident walk.
Create motion trail effect — multiple faded clones behind the subject showing walking movement.

STYLING:
Modern streetwear outfit:
Loose white shirt (similar to reference style),
Wide grey trousers,
Casual sneakers.
Natural fabric folds and realistic texture.

ENVIRONMENT:
Modern building exterior with textured walls.
Glass structure / metal beams.
Patterned wall panel on one side.
Urban luxury vibe.

LIGHTING:
Golden hour sunlight.
Warm tones, cinematic shadows.
Long shadows on ground.

CAMERA & COMPOSITION:
Low angle slightly behind perspective.
Full body shot.
Strong depth and perspective lines.

MOTION EFFECT (IMPORTANT):
3–4 ghosted silhouettes trailing behind the subject.
Transparent motion blur clones fading backward.

POSTER DESIGN:
Large bold typography at top: "MOTION"
Clean modern font.
Small subtitle text below:
"SPRING / SUMMER 2025"
Minimal branding text.

CINEMATIC LOOK:
High contrast,
Sharp details,
Slight film grain,
Professional fashion magazine quality.

REALISM:
Ultra realistic,
No AI artifacts,
Natural proportions.

--ar 9:16 --v 6 --style raw --q 2 --s 150 --iw 2

[Use the uploaded FRONT selfie as PRIMARY face identity reference]
[Use the side profile image as SECONDARY reference for hair and angles]

Ultra-realistic cinematic editorial photograph of the SAME person, maintaining strong facial identity from the reference images.

IDENTITY LOCK (CRITICAL):
Preserve the exact same face from the front selfie:
same facial structure, jawline, beard density, eyes, eyebrows, nose, lips.
Do NOT stylize, reshape, or beautify the face.
Skin must be clean and natural (no pimples, no artificial texture).
No tattoos.

HAIR:
Black, short, slightly damp, slightly messy.
Styled EXACTLY like in the reference image.
Natural volume, no deformation.

POSE & COMPOSITION:
Subject sitting in the driver’s seat of a black luxury car.
Car door open.
Body slightly leaning forward.
One hand resting confidently on the steering wheel.
Head tilted downward (calm, introspective mood).
Low camera angle, cinematic framing.

OUTFIT (HIGH DETAIL):
Premium white double-breasted suit (6-button, 6x2 layout).
Thin vertical pinstripes.
Sharp peak lapels.
Structured shoulders, slim tailored fit.
Gold metallic buttons.
Matching white pinstriped trousers with relaxed bootcut drape.

INNER LAYER:
Deep black satin shirt, open collar, no tie.

ACCESSORIES:
Minimal chain necklace.

ENVIRONMENT:
Open outdoor landscape with tall wild grass.
Background fades into bright overexposed sky.
Large negative space.

LIGHTING:
High-contrast cinematic lighting.
Soft transitions with controlled highlights.
Natural sunlight feel.
Subtle glow on edges.

STYLE & FINISH:
Matte cinematic color grading.
Low saturation.
Slight film grain.
Medium-format photography look.
Ultra-detailed, 4K realism.

CAMERA:
85mm lens look.
Shallow depth of field.
Sharp subject focus, soft background.

REALISM RULES:
No AI artifacts.
No distortion.
No extra facial features.
No changes in identity.

--ar 2:3 --style raw --v 6 --q 2 --s 100 --iw 2.5
